data.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications and distributed systems. Expert in Python, JavaScript, and cloud infrastructure. Passionate about clean code, system design, and mentoring junior developers.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Architected and developed microservices handling 10M+ daily requests using Python, FastAPI, and Kubernetes. Led migration of legacy monolith to cloud-native architecture, reducing infrastructure costs by 40%. Designed and implemented real-time data processing pipeline using Apache Kafka and Apache Spark. Mentored team of 5 junior engineers, conducting code reviews and technical training sessions.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Developed RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints serving mobile and web clients. Built automated testing framework increasing test coverage from 45% to 85%. Collaborated with product team to define technical requirements and delivery timelines. Participated in on-call rotation, maintaining 99.9% uptime SLA.

experience.title: Junior Software Engineer
experience.description: Developed full-stack features using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Implemented user authentication and authorization systems. Optimized database queries reducing page load time by 50%. Participated in agile development process, daily standups, and sprint planning.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
